parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant Application as App #E6E6FA
participant "Auto SDK Engine" as Engine <<engine>> #87CEFA
participant Alexa as Alexa <<avs>> #C1FFC1

note right of User: "Turn off AC"
User -> Alexa: 
Alexa -> Engine: PowerController.TurnOff directive
activate Engine #87CEFA
Engine -> App: Receive SetPowerControllerValue message
App -> App: Turn off AC
App -> Engine: Publish SetControllerValueMessage Reply
Engine -> Alexa: Alexa.Response event
deactivate Engine

note right of Engine: SpeechSynthesizer.Speak directive\n<<Alexa speech response>>
Alexa -> App: 

@enduml
```
